# Mistborne

Being part of a mistborne community means you were shaped by uncertain environments, where limited visibility and shifting conditions make complete understanding impossible.

## Features

**Through the Veil:** You have advantage on rolls made in obscured or low-visibility environments, including complete darkness.

> **Design notes:** For this Community, I envisioned people who grew up in places filled with mist, low visibility, and ever-changing conditions. These environments are often unstable and unpredictable, shaping individuals who are used to navigating the world without complete clarity.
